Attached to grader blade with current pressure transducer. Mid-section

CORRECTION TO Q - ORIGINAL METER EQUATION INCORRECT, STANDARD ERROR VALUE WAS USED AS INTERCEPT, CORRECT INTERCEPT IS 0.0077. TO CORRECT THIS ERROR THE DIFFERENCE IN BOTH INTERCEPTS - CORRECT AND ONE USED WAS ADDED TO THE MEAN VELOCITY THEN  MULTIPLIED BY AREA TO ULTIMATELY CHANGE Q BY 0.04M3S, AS SEEN ABOVE - BR  Control Condition: OPE  Measurement Section Co dition: open Weather Condition: par ly cloudy Sources:Import

INCORRECT METER EQUATION USED - STANDARD ERROR VALUE INCORRECTLY USED AS INTERCEPT, TRUE INTERCEPT 0.0077. TO CORRECT ADDED DIFFERENCE IN INTERCEPTS TO MEAN VELOCITY BEFORE MULTIPLYING BY AREA - TO BRING A DIFFERENCE IN Q OF 0.04m3s  Control Condition: OPE  Measurement Section Co dition: open Weather Condition: 100 cc Sources:Import

Incorrect meter equation used, tech (BR) had input the standard error estimate 0.0016 as the intercept, correct intercept was 0.0077. Correction done - as per checkers recommendation, added difference from two intercepts to the mean velocity then multiplied by area, changing the Q from 4.42 to 4.47m3s - BR Control Condition: OPE  Measurement Section Co dition: open Weather Condition: sun y Sources:Import
